Home›Partnerships›Referral› SOC 2
Referral Program

SOC 2 Compliance Referral
Program

Refer organizations needing SOC 2 Type I or Type II readiness. Control implementation, policy development, and audit preparation.

How the SOC 2 Referral Program Works

Refer organizations needing SOC 2 Type I or Type II readiness. Control implementation, policy development, and audit preparation.

When you refer a qualified organization, we handle the entire sales process, delivery, and ongoing relationship management. You earn competitive ongoing commissions for the life of the engagement — not a one-time finder's fee.

How It Works

  • Submit a referral through our partner portal or direct introduction
  • We conduct a confidential consultation with the referred organization
  • Upon engagement, you receive ongoing revenue share for the life of the relationship
  • Quarterly partner reporting with transparent deal tracking
  • Co-branded materials available for qualified partners

Ideal Partner Profiles

  • Managed Service Providers (MSPs) without a dedicated soc 2 practice
  • IT consulting firms encountering soc 2 needs
  • Attorneys specializing in business, data privacy, or cyber litigation
  • Insurance brokers writing cyber liability policies
  • Compliance consultants working with regulated industries

Why Digital Forensics .company

Every referred engagement is handled with the same discretion, urgency, and technical depth that Fortune 50 enterprises expect. Your reputation is our reputation — we treat every referral as a reflection of your professional judgment.

Partner Revenue

Earn competitive ongoing commissions for every qualified SOC 2 referral.

Apply to Partner

Program Details

  • Ongoing revenue share
  • No minimum referrals
  • No exclusivity required
  • Transparent deal tracking
  • Co-branded materials
Become a Partner
Ready to Add Cybersecurity to Your Portfolio?

Apply today and start earning from cybersecurity referrals immediately.
